global_description: A small, slender bird with a streamlined body and a short, slightly hooked bill. It features a predominantly grayish-brown plumage with lighter underparts and a darker head. The wings and tail are long and narrow, aiding in agile flight.

part_details.head: Darker gray with a slightly rounded shape, featuring a small, dark eye.
part_details.bill: Short, slightly hooked, and dark in color.
part_details.wings: Long, narrow, and grayish-brown, aiding in flight.
part_details.tail: Long, narrow, and slightly forked, matching the wing color.

spatial_relations: The wings are attached to the sides of the streamlined body.
The tail extends from the rear of the body, slightly forked.
The bill protrudes from the front of the darker head.
